title: AWaC <product>/agent-stack/devvault.yml
description: Per-product CATALOG of secrets needed to operate the product. Pure pointers — never holds the secret value itself. Resolves against ~/.devvault/.config.yml#vault_path on each developer's machine. The vault_path is per-machine (different developers may keep their .devvault elsewhere) and MUST NOT be committed in this catalog.

product.description: Product slug (lowercased, no `get` prefix). Must match the agent-stack's awac.yml product field.

secrets.description: Mapping logical_name -> path (relative to ~/.devvault/<vault_path_root>/). Logical names are stable; paths are conventions of how secrets are organized inside the vault.
